title: Dragonfire AA Expansion
description: the dragons from the dragonfire mod into the isle of berk style
body:
This pack is an addon to Archipelago Additions that brings in the dragons from the dragonfire mod along with variants from the little club's series on that mod.

NEW DRAGONS

Flame Dragon: "A mutation of the Ace dragon that ate Flame Crystals and now are found across the world"
Water Dragon: "A mutation of the Ace dragon that ate Water Crystals and now are found across the world"
Forest Dragon: "A mutation of the Ace dragon that ate Forest Crystals and now are found across the world"
Shadow Dragon: "A mutation of the Ace dragon that ate Shadow Crystals and now are found across the world"
Bone Dragon: "Ace dragons from ancient times that have been fossilized and can be hatched from eggs found in caves"
Storm Dragon: "A hybrid between the Ace dragon and the Stormfalcon found throughout the world"
Ace: "The Ace dragon is a fiery dragon that is popular amongst younger trainers. They can also be very loyal and will obey their masters with the right training"

all of these and a few others can be found with this mod installed

CREDITS/DISCLAIMER

Dragonfire (AA Expansion) is a project made by me, Firedust. The dragon models use IoB models as a base due to hardcoded rigging dependencies making it impractical to scratch model. I do not claim to have made these models, they were created by the IoB team and now belong to NBD. I am permitted use of these IoB base assets provided we remain as an addon to IoB and/or NBD and do not claim to have made them. I also did not make the concepts behind these dragons and all of the credits go to the Dragonfire team. Razorwhip_queen2 made the fury family textures that I edited/used as inspiration for this pack and I thank them for giving me permission to use them. These credits may change as necessary. They will always be correct to the most recent release of this mod. I am also not affiliated with the official How to Train Your Dragon franchise, Dreamworks animation or the Dragonfire team.
